howItWorks.title: 3 steps to a
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bedrooms, bathrooms, pool, patio... Our calculator generates the exact price in real time. Full transparency.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Calendar with real-time availability (Mon–Sat, 8am–6pm). No double bookings. Your slot is guaranteed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Secure checkout via Stripe. Instant email confirmation. Our team arrives on schedule.

benefits.subtitle: We built HubNestly because we know how valuable your time is. No calls, no negotiations, no price surprises. Everything online, transparent, and stress-free.
benefits.feat1Desc: Pay online and receive instant confirmation in your email.
benefits.feat2Desc: Trained teams with real-time route tracking.

benefits.feat4Desc: Need help? Our team responds quickly — for real.

calculator.title: Calculate your price

testimonials.title: Customers who transformed
testimonials.text1: Finally a cleaning service that really works! I booked from my phone in 2 minutes, the team arrived on time, and the house looked amazing. Already scheduled for next month!
testimonials.text2: The real-time price calculator is a game changer. No surprises, no negotiation. You know exactly what you'll pay before confirming. Very professional team.
testimonials.text3: With my busy schedule, HubNestly saved my time. I book through the app, pay online, and just need to come home and enjoy. I recommend it to any busy person!

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.a1: We serve cleaning companies across the entire United States, from coast to coast.
faq.a2: Automatically based on the number of rooms, special areas (pool, garage, etc.) and your property settings. No surprises.
faq.a3: Yes! You can cancel directly from the dashboard, hassle-free, up to 24 hours before the service.
faq.a4: Yes. We use Stripe, the world's most trusted payment platform. Your data never passes through our server.
faq.q5: How far in advance should I book?
faq.a5: Minimum 24 hours. We recommend booking 3–5 days in advance to secure the best time slot.

forBusinesses.card1Desc: Add the HubNestly link to your site and visitors leave with a booked and paid service. Works as a complement — without replacing what you already have.
forBusinesses.card2Desc: Perfect. Add the link to your bio, share in status and stories. Your followers start booking and paying directly, without having to message you.
forBusinesses.card3Desc: HubNestly is all you need. Your link becomes your complete digital presence — booking, payment, and management in 3 minutes.
